Legal & Policies

Terms of Service

These Terms of Service govern your use of the Neff Paving website and the paving, concrete, and excavation services we provide. Please read them carefully.

Last updated: June 16, 2026

On this page

  • 1. Acceptance of Terms
  • 2. Our Services
  • 3. Estimates & Quotes
  • 4. Scheduling & Performance
  • 5. Payment Terms
  • 6. Warranties
  • 7. Your Responsibilities
  • 8. Limitation of Liability
  • 9. Website Use
  • 10. Changes to These Terms
  • 11. Governing Law
  • 12. Contact Us

In these Terms, "Neff Paving," "we," "us," and "our" refer to Neff Paving, located at 6575 W Pike, Zanesville, OH 43701. "You" and "your" refer to the person or entity using our website or services. By using our website or engaging our services, you agree to these Terms.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this website, requesting an estimate, or hiring Neff Paving for any work, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our website or services.

2. Our Services

Neff Paving provides residential and commercial paving, asphalt, concrete, sealing, and excavation services throughout Central Ohio. The specific scope, materials, and price of any project are defined in the written estimate or contract provided to you for that project.

We reserve the right to decline or discontinue any project, and to refuse service to anyone, for any lawful reason.

3. Estimates & Quotes

Instant estimates generated through our website (including measurements from the satellite map tool) are preliminary, non-binding, ballpark figures provided for planning purposes only. They are based on standard per-square-foot rates and the dimensions you supply.

A final, binding price requires a professional on-site evaluation and a written quote signed by both parties. Final pricing may vary based on site conditions, base preparation, drainage, material availability, accessibility, and project specifications.

4. Scheduling & Performance

Paving and concrete work is weather-dependent. Start and completion dates are good-faith estimates and may shift due to weather, material supply, equipment availability, or conditions discovered on site. We will make reasonable efforts to keep you informed of any changes to your schedule.

5. Payment Terms

Payment terms, deposits, and schedules are set out in your individual project contract. Unless otherwise agreed in writing:

  • A deposit may be required to schedule and order materials for your project.
  • The remaining balance is due upon completion of the work.
  • We accept the payment methods identified in your contract, which may include secure online payment.
  • Past-due balances may be subject to late fees as permitted by Ohio law.

6. Warranties

Neff Paving stands behind its workmanship. Any warranty applicable to your project — including its length and coverage — is described in your written contract. Warranties do not cover damage resulting from normal wear, improper use, neglect, failure to maintain the surface, ground movement, drainage issues outside our scope, or work performed by others.

Manufacturer warranties on materials, where applicable, are passed through to you and governed by the manufacturer's terms.

7. Your Responsibilities

  • Provide accurate information about your property and the work you need.
  • Ensure clear, safe access to the work area on scheduled dates.
  • Identify and disclose the location of private utilities, sprinkler lines, septic systems, and other underground features not marked by public locating services.
  • Obtain any homeowners' association or private approvals required for your project.
  • Keep vehicles, pets, and people clear of work areas and freshly placed surfaces during curing.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Neff Paving is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or our services. Our total liability for any claim relating to a project is limited to the amount you paid for that project. Nothing in these Terms limits liability that cannot be limited under applicable law.

This website and its content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Tools such as the instant estimator and map measurement feature are provided for convenience and may contain inaccuracies.

9. Website Use

You agree not to misuse this website, including by attempting to gain unauthorized access, interfering with its operation, or using it for any unlawful purpose. Our website may use third-party tools and services (for example, mapping imagery and form delivery) that are subject to their own terms.

All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, and images — is owned by or licensed to Neff Paving and may not be copied or reused without permission.

10. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision. Your continued use of our website or services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

11. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Ohio, without regard to its conflict-of-law rules. Any dispute arising under these Terms will be handled in the state or federal courts located in Ohio.

12. Contact Us

Questions about these Terms?

We're happy to help clarify anything here.
